thinking:
**Refining Visual Integration**

I've been examining the visual integration of the theme toggle and logout buttons. Initial assessments of the `.theme-toggle-btn` are positive, with well-defined borders and effective hover transitions. I'm now exploring the optimal display of both buttons within the sidebar footer to ensure a cohesive and aesthetically pleasing presentation, particularly focusing on how this works within `App.tsx`.
